arts.ttl: Plymouth left embarrassed over Wayne Rooney sacking as social media post goes viral
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney left Plymouth Argyle this week after just seven months in charge, but fans who have purchased the club's new 2025 calendar will be seeing him for a while

arts.ttl: Mark Sykes, Kal Naismith, Sinclair Armstrong: Bristol City team news ahead of Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Liam Manning has confirmed that Bristol City's New Year's Day clash with Plymouth Argyle will come "too soon" for Mark Sykes to make his return from injury, but insists the winger is "very close" to a comeback. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney gets brutal reality check over future after Plymouth sacking
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney's future in management is up in the air after Plymouth Argyle announced that the former England star had left his post at Home Park earlier this week

arts.ttl: Rooney leaves Plymouth Argyle after dismal run
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle part company with head coach Wayne Rooney with the Pilgrims bottom of the Championship.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney set for immediate return to work with 'big-money deal' on table
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney was sacked by Plymouth on Tuesday after a dire six months in charge of the Championship strugglers - but it's claimed he won't be out of work for long

arts.ttl: 'Humble & popular but no plan B' - the inside story of Rooney at Plymouth
arts.sum: As Wayne Rooney leaves his latest managerial role with Plymouth, BBC Sport looks at where it went wrong for the legendary striker.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney set for instant return after Plymouth sacking with 'big-money deal' offered
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney was sacked by Championship side Plymouth Argyle on Tuesday after a disastrous few months but the Manchester United icon might not be out of work for very long
Aidan Perkins previews the New Year's Day fixtures in the Championship and has a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney call left wife Coleen 'gutted' before Plymouth Argyle sacking
arts.sum: Coleen Rooney was a surprise late entrant to the ITV reality show I'm A Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, and while her husband Wayne was supportive, he was unable to meet her on the bridge when she was evicted due to his then job in football

arts.ttl: EFL preview: Plymouth look to kickstart season after Rooney exit
arts.sum: With Wayne Rooney exiting Plymouth Argyle, BBC Sport takes a look at what New Year's Day has in store in the EFL.
